videos.headline: DJ Uiagalelei pushes across the goal line for his first Oregon State TD
videos.description: DJ Uiagalelei pushes his way across the goal line for his first touchdown for Oregon State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (DJ Uiagalelei pushes across the goal line for his first Oregon State TD) 2023/09/03 ESHEET

videos.headline: DJ Uiagalelei finds the end zone for his 3rd total TD
videos.description: DJ Uiagalelei runs it in for his second rushing TD of the game and third total as Oregon State extends its lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (DJ Uiagalelei finds the end zone for his 3rd total TD) 2023/09/03 ESHEET
